articles.headline: $20+ Bn Connected Worker Global Market Forecasts 2025-2030 with Zebra Technologies, Honeywell International, Microsoft, and Hexagon Dominating
articles.summary: The global connected worker market is projected to grow from USD 8.62 billion in 2025 to USD 20.18 billion by 2030, with an impressive CAGR of 18.5%. This growth is driven by the increasing adoption of remote and hybrid work models, which utilize advanced digital tools for seamless communication across distributed teams. The Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) dominated the 2024 market, enhancing operational efficiency and safety, especially in manufacturing and construction. The software segme

articles.headline: Iran, Dip-Buyers & a Rare Buffett Stumble: Wall Street Shakes Off Its Worst Fears
articles.summary: U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran rattled markets at the open, but seasoned dip-buyers pushed the major indices back to near-flat by the close. Meanwhile, Berkshire Hathaway's post-Buffett era gets off to a rocky start, and energy and defense stocks surge.

articles.headline: Richtech Robotics Lawsuits Put Microsoft Ties And Growth Outlook In Focus
articles.summary: Richtech Robotics (NasdaqCM:RR) is facing multiple securities class action lawsuits over allegations that it misrepresented the nature of its relationship with Microsoft. Microsoft has reportedly said the engagement is limited to a standard customer program, not a broader commercial partnership. articles.headline: Down 18% This Year, Is Microsoft's Stock in Trouble?
articles.summary: The tech giant's stock is performing worse than its peers.

articles.headline: A Market Frenzy Is Lurking Beneath Those Calm Stock Indexes
articles.summary: Shares of the memory-chip manufacturer Sandisk have nearly tripled, meanwhile, while Texas Pacific Land, a real-estate company that has become a data-center play, is up 85%.  Cox’s income-oriented, dividend-focused holdings have had a strong year.

articles.headline: Barry Diller’s IAC Agrees to Sell Care.com
articles.summary: The media conglomerate’s shares have been trading poorly and it has been streamlining itself to focus on core assets.

articles.headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips As Trump Says This On Iran; Warren Buffett Stock Flashes Sell Signal (Live Coverage)
articles.summary: The Dow Jones index fell and other indexes were mixed after President Trump spoke on Iran. A Warren Buffett stock dived but Palantir popped. Oil and defense stocks rose.

articles.headline: Are the Magnificent Seven Stocks Losing Steam? Should You Buy, Hold, or Sell?
articles.summary: After powering the S&P 500 for years, the Magnificent Seven stocks are suddenly lagging in 2026. The smart play might be to do what the crowd isn’t doing.

articles.headline: Sable Offshore Stock Has Tanked 70% This Past Year, and One Fund Just Sold Off $6 Million in Shares
articles.summary: Operating three offshore platforms in California, Sable Offshore Corp. supplies crude oil and natural gas to U.S. customers.
